game.timeout_loss: {player} lost due to inactivity (3 missed turns)!

rules.title: Rules
rules.description: Each turn has two steps: place a dot, then eliminate one adjacent cell.

items.title: 1. Place a dot
items.text: Your first dot can go anywhere. Later dots do not have to be next to another dot, but if they are placed away from your group, they will not connect to it. Dots can connect horizontally, vertically, and diagonally.

items.title: 2. Eliminate a cell
items.text: After placing a dot, you must eliminate one cell next to that dot. The eliminated cell becomes blocked for the rest of the game.

items.title: 3. Score points
items.text: Your score is the size of your largest connected group of dots.

items.title: 4. Casual mode
items.text: Casual games let you choose the board size and timer. You can also create or join rooms manually.

items.title: 5. Ranked mode
items.text: Ranked games always use an 8×8 board, 30-second turns, and matchmaking only. If your opponent leaves, you return to the lobby and your rating does not change.

notifications.opponent_left_no_rating_change: Opponent has left the ranked match. You were returned to lobby and your rating did not change.
notifications.room_not_found: Room not found or game has already started.
